steps.title: Identify the type of critical response
steps.content: The critics in the passage use strong positive language—”galvanizing” and “picture perfect”—to describe the two films. The fans then hope that such _______ will attract new audiences. The blank must represent the positive critical judgment the critics are bestowing on these works.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choice
steps.content: ”Acclaim” means enthusiastic critical approval, which directly captures what the critics express through their positive descriptors. Ambivalence contradicts the clear positive judgment; foresight is about prediction, not current evaluation; impartiality contradicts the strong stance shown. That matches choice B — B is correct.
